ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "interaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type (e.g., DragBox, Click, Hover) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image representing the interaction type */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the interaction type is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction type the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting (e.g., className, condition) */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., string, integer, boolean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_configs_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition function */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction type the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition function (e.g., always, never) */,
  "condition_function" TEXT /* Function code or reference for the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition function */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., spatial, attribute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_conditions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_end_conditions" (
  "end_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each end condition function */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction type the end condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the end condition function */,
  "condition_function" TEXT /* Function code or reference for the end condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the end condition function */,
  "end_condition_type" TEXT /* Type of end condition (e.g., spatial, attribute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("end_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_end_conditions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction type the event belongs to */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., boxend, click) */,
  "event_function" TEXT /* Function code or reference for the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., click, hover) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_events_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the map */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the map */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the map was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the map */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the map was last modified */,
  "map_type" TEXT /* Type of map (e.g., 2D, 3D) */,
  "projection" TEXT /* Projection of the map (e.g., EPSG:4326) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "map_layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map the layer belongs to */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer */,
  "layer_type" TEXT /* Type of the layer (e.g., raster, vector) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the layer data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layer */,
  "layer_order" INTEGER /* Order of the layer in the map */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the layer is visible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_layers_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "map_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map the interaction belongs to */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction type */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction configuration */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition function */,
  "end_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end condition function */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event function */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the interaction is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_interactions_end_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_condition_id") REFERENCES interaction_end_conditions ("end_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_interactions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES interaction_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_interactions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES interaction_configs ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_interactions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES interaction_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_interactions_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_map_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_map_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_map_access_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_data" TEXT /* Data or details of the interaction */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for the interaction (e.g., browser, OS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES map_interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key string */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the API key */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the API key */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the API key was created */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the API key expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API key used for the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_data_sources_api_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("api_key_id") REFERENCES api_keys ("api_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the layer belongs to */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer */,
  "layer_type" TEXT /* Type of the layer (e.g., raster, vector) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_layers_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES api_data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "map_data_source_layers" (
  "map_layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map-layer relationship */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source layer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the layer is active on the map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_data_source_layers_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_data_source_layers_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES data_source_layers ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "map_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map the style belongs to */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "style_json" TEXT /* JSON object containing the style definition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_styles_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "map_layer_styles" (
  "layer_style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer style */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer the style belongs to */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style */,
  "style_json" TEXT /* JSON object containing the style definition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_layer_styles_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES map_styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_layer_styles_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES map_layers ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
